title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Piper nigrum, also known as black pepper, essential oils helps with cough because of its expectorant properties. The oil contains compounds like piperine and beta-caryophyllene that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. These properties help in loosening and clearing mucus from the airways, reducing congestion and coughing. Additionally, the oil's decongestant properties also aid in reducing the thickness of mucus, making it easier to expel, thereby providing relief from co...
